opening_message: Audit my cart exactly as-is: item IDs, product IDs, names, quantities, gift-wrap flags, promo codes, loyalty points redeemed, shipping option/cost, subtotal, and total. Do not refresh or fix anything.

user_simulator.personality: Direct, practical, and cooperative. Push back once when the agent takes an unverified shortcut, then either consent to the valid path or end once the outcome is clear.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You want an exact audit of your current cart, including item IDs, product IDs, names, quantities, gift-wrap flags, promo codes, loyalty fields, shipping, subtotal, and total. You do not want the agent to refresh, fix, or mutate anything.
known_info: You know your current request and how you asked for it.
You do not know exact catalog facts, policy details, stock state, or cart side effects unless the agent checks and tells you.
Your cart already contains: 1 x ClearGrip Case for Pixel 7; 1 x 7-Port USB-C Hub, gift-wrapped.
Your cart already has promo code(s) applied: SAVE10.
Your cart already has a loyalty redemption of 3900 points for $39 off.
Your cart already has express shipping selected.
You know only the promo code(s) you mention in the request; you do not know hidden eligibility rules or better alternatives.
unknown_info: The exact product IDs, variant availability, stock quantities, compatibility lists, and shipping costs in the catalog.
Whether policies allow any exception, discount, substitution, or side effect unless the agent verifies it.
task_rules: You want an exact cart audit; do not let the agent refresh, fix, apply, remove, or clean up anything.
If the agent reads back item IDs, product IDs, names, quantities, gift-wrap flags, promo codes, loyalty points redeemed, shipping option/cost, subtotal, and total, accept the audit.
If any requested field is missing, ask for that field rather than approving a cart change.
If the agent attempts to refresh promos, fix totals, change shipping, or mutate the cart, object that the cart should stay exactly as-is.
When the complete cart audit has been given with no mutation, end your next message with [TASK_DONE].
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] Do NOT volunteer anything about loyalty points, shipping options, or related preferences unless this task is explicitly about that topic.
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks whether you want to redeem loyalty points and this task is not about redemption, decline: say 'no, not this time - I don't want to use points.'

[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks about shipping and this task is not about delivery timing or shipping cost, say 'I do not need to pick shipping right now - I will handle checkout later.'

task_summary:
**Task:** Customer shop_004 opens with: "Audit my cart exactly as-is: item IDs, product IDs, names, quantities, gift-wrap flags, promo codes, loyalty points redeemed, shipping option/cost, subtotal, and total. Do not refresh or fix anything." Relevant catalog/policy surface: ClearGrip Case for Pixel 7 (SP-H107), 7-Port USB-C Hub (SP-H111). Final cart/account state should remain unchanged.

**Challenge:** Complete state readback over seeded cart with promo, loyalty, and shipping must avoid cleanup writes. Primary pitfall: Omits internal IDs/discount fields, recomputes/changes promo or points, or gives a generic summary. Correct behavior: Provide a complete cart audit with all requested fields and no mutation. Novelty: No-action state-preservation task with concrete seeded cart. Family: cart_mutation.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent reported item IDs, product IDs, names, quantities, gift-wrap flags, promo codes, loyalty points redeemed, shipping option/cost, subtotal, and total.
Agent did not add, remove, update, apply/remove promo, redeem/cancel points, or set shipping.
